## Checklist

### Build

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with zero errors
- [ ] No TypeScript or Astro compilation warnings
- [ ] No new client-side JavaScript unless strictly necessary

### Brand Compliance

- [ ] Colors: only Navy `#0F172A`, Blue `#007AFF`, White `#FFFFFF`, Gray `#F8FAFC`
- [ ] Font: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif only
- [ ] No hardcoded hex/rgba values — uses CSS variables or Tailwind tokens
- [ ] Voice: direct, confident, action-oriented, team-first ("we" not "I")

### Quality

- [ ] Responsive: tested at 640px, 768px, 1024px breakpoints
- [ ] Accessibility: proper heading hierarchy, alt text, focus states (WCAG AA)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials
- [ ] Conventional commit messages (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`)

### Content (if applicable)

- [ ] Unique `<title>`, `<meta description>`, and Open Graph tags on new pages
- [ ] No AI-isms (em dashes in prose, "streamline," "leverage," passive voice)
- [ ] MDX frontmatter matches content collection schema
